plugins.name: Forum stats
plugins.summary: Public forum totals card on the home page — posts, topics, and registered members (fragment guest cache).

plugins.name: Image upload (R2)
plugins.summary: Direct browser upload to Cloudflare R2 with compose toolbar integration.

plugins.name: Word filter
plugins.summary: Block or mask profanity in posts and new topic titles before save.

plugins.name: Spam bridge
plugins.summary: Akismet and Stop Forum Spam checks for posts and registrations.

plugins.name: Slack notify
plugins.summary: Post forum activity to a Slack or Discord incoming webhook.

plugins.name: Link preview
plugins.summary: Rich link cards and optional YouTube/Vimeo embeds for standalone post URLs.

plugins.name: Privacy analytics
plugins.summary: Plausible or Matomo analytics in the page head — privacy-friendly, no Google in core.
